text: i want to help, but "is this normal?" on its own doesn't give me enough to go on — and i don't see a child scoped for this turn, so i can't ground my answer on a specific stage. could you tell me what you're seeing, and which kid you're asking about? a few helpful details: roughly how old they are, what specifically has you wondering (sleep, eating, a behavior, a milestone, a body thing), and how long it's been going on. that lets me speak to what's typical for their stage instead of guessing. and one note up front: if it's anything in the realm of symptoms or how they're feeling physically, your pediatric office is the right call — i can talk about what's common, but i'm not the one to interpret a symptom.
